$comment: Files listed here are exempt from coverage thresholds. Each entry needs a reason naming the specific untestable API. The svelte-tests check shrink-wraps this list: it removes entries whose file no longer exists (local runs) and warns when a file now clears the threshold with margin to spare — remove those entries or update their reason.

accent-color.ts.reason: Depends on Tauri invoke and listen APIs

crash-reporter/CrashReportDialog.svelte.reason: UI dialog, depends on Tauri commands for send/dismiss

crash-reporter/CrashReportToastContent.s.reason: UI toast content, depends on Tauri window APIs

debug/debug-window.ts.reason: Depends on Tauri WebviewWindow API; dev-only

downloads/LatestDownloadEmptyToastConten.reason: Thin UI wrapper; click handlers delegate to the setEmptyToastHandler closure tested in go-to-latest.test.ts

downloads/LatestDownloadFdaToastContent..reason: Thin UI wrapper; click delegates to openPrivacySettings (Tauri command) and dismissToast

file-explorer/drag/DragOverlay.svelte.reason: UI overlay component, state tested in drag-overlay tests

file-explorer/drag/drag-image-renderer.t.reason: Canvas API dependent, pure logic tested separately

file-explorer/modifier-key-tracker.svelt.reason: Document event listeners, reactive Svelte state

file-explorer/navigation/VolumeBreadcrum.reason: UI component, depends on Tauri APIs and MTP store

file-explorer/navigation/volume-breadcru.reason: Extracted from VolumeBreadcrumb.svelte; reactive Svelte state + DOM event listeners (keyboard mode, submenu/popup controllers), depends on parent component refs

file-explorer/network/ConnectToServerDia.reason: Network dialog, depends on Tauri connectToServer command

file-explorer/pane/DialogManager.svelte.reason: Pure rendering component, dialog state tested via parent

file-explorer/pane/ErrorPane.svelte.reason: UI component, logic tested in error-pane-utils.test.ts

file-explorer/pane/MtpConnectionView.sve.reason: MTP connection UI, depends on Tauri APIs

file-explorer/pane/NetworkMountView.svel.reason: Network mount UI, depends on Tauri APIs

file-explorer/pane/PaneResizer.svelte.reason: Mouse drag UI component, difficult to unit test

file-explorer/pane/dialog-state.svelte.t.reason: Reactive Svelte state, depends on FilePane refs and Tauri commands

file-explorer/pane/initialization.ts.reason: All code paths depend on Tauri commands (pathExists, getDefaultVolumeId, resolvePathVolume, getE2eStartPath)

file-explorer/pane/listing-diff-sync.sve.reason: Tauri listen() wiring inside $effect factories (same shape as ai-toast-sync); pure reconcileCursorAndSelection core tested in listing-diff-sync.test.ts, integration via selection-consistency.test.ts

file-explorer/pane/rename-flow.svelte.ts.reason: Extracted from FilePane, depends on Tauri commands and rename operations

file-explorer/pane/sorting-handlers.ts.reason: applySortResult/collectSortState depend on FilePane refs; index functions tested

file-explorer/pane/tab-operations.ts.reason: Extracted from DualPaneExplorer, depends on Tauri commands and confirmDialog

file-explorer/rename/ExtensionChangeDial.reason: UI modal, logic tested in rename-dialogs.test.ts

file-explorer/rename/InlineRenameEditor..reason: UI component, depends on DOM focus/selection APIs

file-explorer/rename/rename-activation.t.reason: Depends on document event listeners and timers

file-explorer/rename/rename-operations.t.reason: Depends on Tauri commands and FilePane integration

file-explorer/tabs/TabBar.svelte.reason: UI component, tab interactions tested via DualPaneExplorer integration

file-explorer/views/BriefList.svelte.reason: Logic tested in brief-list-utils.ts, component mounting heavy

file-explorer/views/FullList.svelte.reason: Logic tested in full-list-utils.ts, component mounting heavy

file-operations/delete/DeleteDialog.svel.reason: UI modal, logic tested in delete-dialog-utils.test.ts

file-operations/mkdir/NewFolderDialog.sv.reason: UI modal, logic tested in new-folder-utils.test.ts

file-operations/mkdir/new-folder-operati.reason: Depends on FilePane refs and Tauri listen API

file-operations/mkfile/NewFileDialog.sve.reason: UI modal, logic tested in new-file-operations.test.ts and filename-validation.test.ts

file-operations/transfer/TransferProgres.reason: UI dialog, depends on Tauri events

hmr-recovery.ts.reason: Dev-only HMR crash handler, runs inside import.meta.hot, depends on window/sessionStorage/location.reload

indexing/index-events.ts.reason: Thin wrapper over Tauri listen API

indexing/index-state.svelte.ts.reason: Reactive Svelte state, depends on Tauri event listeners

ipc/bindings.ts.reason: Auto-generated by tauri-specta, contains only Tauri IPC wrappers with no testable logic

licensing/LicenseKeyDialog.svelte.reason: UI modal, depends on Tauri commands

mtp/MtpConnectedToastContent.svelte.reason: UI toast content, depends on Tauri IPC (setSetting, dismissToast)

query-ui/PathPills.svelte.reason: Pure split semantics are covered by PathPills.svelte.test.ts; the overflow-collapse layout depends on `@chenglou/pretext` canvas measurement + ResizeObserver, neither of which runs in jsdom. The visible layout is exercised via the MCP-driven manual verification in the search-fixup pass.

search/SearchDialog.svelte.reason: Search dialog UI, depends on Tauri commands and event listeners

settings/components/SettingsSidebar.svel.reason: UI component, search logic tested via registry

settings/reactive-settings.svelte.ts.reason: Svelte reactive state, depends on settings store
